3D4Makers PEEK.notes: Dutch high-perf specialist; needs heated chamber and all-metal hotend.

3D4Makers PEI ULTEM 1010.notes: ULTEM 1010 grade; Tg 217C; continuous use to 170C; aerospace/medical.

3D4Makers PEKK-A.notes: Amorphous PEKK; chamber 70-150C recommended; lower crystallinity drag than PEEK.

3DFuel Pro PETG.notes: 100% virgin PETG resin; runs hot vs typical PETG; near-zero warping.

3DFuel Workday PLA.notes: US-made (North Dakota); high-heat-grade PLA; faster crystallization for better thermal resistance.

3DXTech CarbonX PEKK-CF.notes: PEKK with carbon fibre; slightly easier than pure PEEK.

3DXTech PEEK.notes: High-temp aerospace PEEK; needs 500 °C hotend + 90 °C chamber.

Amazon Basics PETG.notes: Amazon house brand; no official TDS published; PETG family defaults.

Amazon Basics PLA.notes: Amazon house brand; no official TDS published; PLA family defaults; broad colour range.

Amazon Basics TPU 95A.notes: Amazon house brand TPU 95A; no official TDS; flexible family defaults.

Ambrosia ABS Matte.notes: Matte ABS; enclosure required; AMS-friendly cardboard spool.

Ambrosia ASA-CF.notes: Carbon-fibre ASA; UV/weather resistant; hardened steel nozzle required; enclosure required.

Ambrosia PETG.notes: US-made; high impact strength; AMS-friendly cardboard spool.

Ambrosia PLA.notes: US-made; +/-0.03 mm tolerance; AMS-friendly cardboard spool.

Amolen PLA Marble.notes: Stone-particle-loaded PLA; matte marble appearance; hardened nozzle recommended.

Amolen PLA Wood.notes: 20% real wood fibre; hardened nozzle recommended; sandable.

Amolen Silk PLA.notes: Silk finish; prints hotter and slower for sheen.

Anycubic PETG.notes: Anycubic's house-brand PETG; vibrant translucent colours.

Anycubic PLA.notes: Anycubic's house-brand PLA; bundled with their printers.

Anycubic PLA+.notes: Toughness-modified PLA; tolerates higher temps than plain PLA.

Atomic Filament PLA.notes: Small US roaster; premium custom colors.

AzureFilm PETG.notes: Slovenian-made; tighter dia tolerance than budget PETG.

BCN3D PETG.notes: Spanish premium PETG; Magigoo recommended for bed adhesion.

BCN3D PLA.notes: Spanish premium; tuned for Sigma/Sigmax/Stratos; full-metal hotend friendly.

BCN3D TPU.notes: Spanish flexible filament; 25 mm/s recommended; 0.8-1.0 mm hotend preferred.

Bambu ASA.notes: UV-stable; higher volumetric than generic ASA.

Bambu PA-GF.notes: Glass-fibre PA; engineering-grade; enclosed chamber + hardened nozzle required.

Bambu PAHT-CF.notes: High-temp CF PA; enclosed chamber & hardened nozzle required.

Bambu PET-CF.notes: Pure PET carbon fibre; high heat deflection; hardened nozzle.

Bambu PETG Translucent.notes: Translucent PETG; tinted-glass aesthetic; AMS compatible.

Bambu PLA Aero.notes: Foaming PLA for lightweight RC parts; flow ratio ~0.50 default; vary nozzle temp to control density; very hygroscopic.

Bambu PLA Basic.notes: High-speed tuned; up to 20 mm³/s volumetric flow.

Bambu PLA Galaxy.notes: Glitter-loaded PLA; sparkle effect; abrasive — hardened nozzle helps.

Bambu PLA Silk.notes: Silk-finish PLA; metallic sheen; AMS compatible.

Bambu TPU 95A HF.notes: Higher flow than typical TPU (8 mm³/s).

Coex3D PETG.notes: US-made; published parameter page; runs slightly cool vs imported PETG.

Coex3D PLA.notes: US-made (Indiana); virgin resin; broad colour range.

ColorFabb PA-CF Low Warp.notes: Carbon-fibre PA with LEHVOSS LUVOCOM; continuous use 120C; hardened nozzle + all-metal hotend required; very low warp.

ColorFabb XT-CF20.notes: Carbon-fibre PETG copolyester; hardened nozzle required.

ColorFabb copperFill.notes: Copper-particle PLA; polishable to metal sheen; hardened nozzle required.

ColorFabb nGen.notes: Amphora copolyester; easier than PETG, higher Tg.

Creality CR-PLA.notes: Creality's standard house-brand PLA; bundled with Ender / CR series.

Creality Hyper ABS.notes: High-speed ABS; enclosure required; +/-0.05 mm tolerance.

Creality Hyper PETG.notes: High-speed PETG; pairs with K1/K2 high-flow hotends.

Creality Hyper PLA.notes: High-speed tuned for K1 / K2 series; up to 600 mm/s rated.

Das Filament PETG.notes: German-made; softening 80C; low shrinkage; odour-neutral; 1.75 and 2.85 mm gauges.

Das Filament PLA.notes: German-made; softening 55-60C; available in 1.75 and 2.85 mm.

Devil Design ASA.notes: Polish ASA; UV/weather resistant; enclosure required.

Devil Design HIPS.notes: Polish HIPS; limonene-soluble support for ABS/ASA dual-extrusion.

Devil Design PLA.notes: Polish premium; broad colour range; sweet spot 205-215C.

Devil Design PLA-MATT.notes: Matte-finish PLA; layer lines hidden; Polish premium.

Duramic PETG.notes: US Amazon brand; non-tangling, non-clogging, non-stringing claims.

Duramic PLA+.notes: US Amazon brand; +/-0.03 mm; cardboard spool; 8x strength claim.

ELEGOO PLA.notes: House-brand PLA bundled with ELEGOO Centauri / Neptune series.

ELEGOO Rapid PETG.notes: High-speed PETG; rated 30-600 mm/s; +/-0.02 mm tolerance.

Eryone PETG.notes: Chinese mid-tier; runs slightly cooler than typical PETG.

Eryone PLA Silk.notes: Silk-finish PLA blend; lustrous metallic-look surface.

Eryone PLA+.notes: Toughness-modified PLA; suitable for FDM 3D printers.

Extrudr GreenTec Pro.notes: Austrian biopolymer (PLA-based); 100% renewable raw materials; HDT 160C; PEEK-like high-perf bioplastic.

Fiberlogy Easy PETG.notes: EU professional PETG; strong adhesion (use glue/tape on glass).

Fiberlogy Easy PLA.notes: EU professional PLA; white needs >=230C minimum due to dye.

Fiberlogy PA12+CF.notes: 15% carbon-fibre PA12; hardened steel nozzle required; engineering parts.

Fillamentum HIPS.notes: Limonene-soluble support for ABS/ASA; same print profile.

Fillamentum NonOilen.notes: PLA/PHB blend; food-safe + dishwasher-safe; HDT 110C without annealing; 100% biodegradable.

Fillamentum PCTG.notes: Glycol-modified copolyester; food-safe claim; tougher than PETG.

Fillamentum Timberfill.notes: Wood-PLA composite; sands and stains like real wood.

Flashforge HS PETG.notes: High-speed PETG; tuned for Adventurer 5M Pro and similar.

Flashforge PLA.notes: House-brand PLA bundled with Adventurer / Creator series.

Formfutura HDGlass.notes: High-transparency PETG; prints slow for clarity.

Geeetech PLA Silk.notes: Silk-finish PLA; +/-0.02 mm tolerance; per-color temp tower recommended.

Hatchbox ABS.notes: US Amazon mainstay ABS; broad colours; enclosure required.

Hatchbox TPU.notes: US Amazon mainstay TPU 95A; direct-drive preferred.

IC3D PETG.notes: US-made (Ohio); runs hot vs typical PETG.

IC3D PLA.notes: US-made (Ohio); virgin resin; published TDS and SDS.

IEMAI CF-PA.notes: Carbon-fibre PA6/PA66 copolymer; mechanical properties hold to 120C; hardened nozzle required.

IEMAI CF-PEEK.notes: 10% carbon-fibre PEEK; lighter and better interlayer than pure PEEK; hardened nozzle required.

Inland ABS.notes: Microcenter house brand ABS; budget-priced; enclosure required.

Inland PLA.notes: Micro Center house brand; reliable budget PLA.

Jayo PETG.notes: Chinese budget PETG; popular on Amazon.

Jayo PLA+.notes: Chinese budget; +/-0.02 mm; tougher than plain PLA; mega-spool sizes.

Jayo Silk PLA+.notes: Multi-color silk PLA blend; lustrous metallic-look surface.

Kexcelled K5 ASA.notes: UV stable, heat resistant to 100C; enclosure required.

Kexcelled K5 PLA.notes: Chinese premium; broad colour range; tight tolerance for the price.

Kimya PEI-9085.notes: Aerospace-grade PEI; needs 250 °C+ chamber for full strength.

Kingroon PETG.notes: Budget Chinese PETG; +/-0.03 mm tolerance; service temp to 84C.

Kingroon PLA.notes: Plant-based renewable PLA; bundled with Kingroon KP3S/KLP1 series.

Mika3D Silk PLA.notes: Multi-color silk PLA; +/-0.05 mm; popular Amazon silk specialty; users often run hotter (~225C) for clog-free flow.

NinjaTek Armadillo.notes: 75D shore — hardest TPU; prints almost like PETG.

NinjaTek NinjaFlex (85A).notes: Very soft; direct drive essential; slow print.

Polymaker CoPA.notes: Copolymer nylon; low shrink; enclosure preferred.

Polymaker Fiberon PA612-CF.notes: Low moisture uptake PA612 with CF; hardened nozzle.

Polymaker PolyDissolve S1.notes: PVA-based; dissolves in water for multi-material supports.

Polymaker PolyDissolve S2.notes: High-temp PVA support; for ABS/ASA/PC; warm alkaline-water soluble; Tg 113C.

Polymaker PolyLite PLA-CF.notes: Hardened nozzle mandatory; stiffer than PLA but brittle.

Polymaker PolyMax PC.notes: Easier to print than most PCs; still needs enclosure.

Polymaker PolyMax PETG.notes: Impact-modified PETG; tougher than PolyLite PETG.

Polymaker PolyMax PLA.notes: Toughness-modified PLA; impact strength near ABS; HDT ~60C.

Polymaker PolyMax Tough PETG.notes: Toughness-modified PETG; higher impact than standard PETG.

Polymaker PolyMide PA6-GF.notes: Glass-fibre reinforced PA6; hardened nozzle required.

Polymaker PolySonic PLA.notes: High-speed PLA; 100-300 mm/s rated; up to 22 mm3/s flow.

Polymaker PolySonic PLA Pro.notes: Toughness-modified high-speed PLA; impact strength near ABS.

Polymaker PolyTerra PLA.notes: Matte PLA; plant-based packaging; great layer hiding.

ProtoPasta Conductive PLA.notes: Carbon-black doped; specialty for low-current circuits.

ProtoPasta HTPLA.notes: Annealable to raise HDT from 55 °C to ~90 °C.

ProtoPasta HTPLA-CF.notes: Carbon-fibre HTPLA; annealable to raise HDT; hardened nozzle required.

ProtoPasta Magnetic Iron PLA.notes: Iron-doped; rusts for weathered look; hardened nozzle.

ProtoPasta Stainless Steel PLA.notes: Stainless-steel-loaded PLA; magnetic; abrasive — hardened steel nozzle required.

Prusament ABS.notes: +/-0.02 mm tolerance; enclosure required; consistent colours.

Prusament PC Blend CF.notes: Very high strength; hardened nozzle mandatory.

Prusament PETG-CF.notes: Carbon-fibre PETG; rigid functional parts; hardened nozzle required.

Prusament PVB.notes: IPA-smoothable for glassy finish; PLA-class print profile; satin or smooth PEI bed recommended.

Push Plastic HIPS.notes: US-made HIPS; limonene-soluble support for ABS dual-extrusion.

Push Plastic PETG.notes: US-made (Arkansas); Push Plastic broad colour range.

QIDI PAHT-CF.notes: Carbon-fibre high-temp nylon; enclosed chamber + hardened nozzle required.

QIDI PETG-CF.notes: Carbon-fibre PETG; rigid functional parts; hardened steel nozzle required.

QIDI PETG-Tough.notes: Toughness-modified PETG; higher impact than standard PETG.

QIDI PLA.notes: House-brand PLA tuned for X-Plus / X-Max / Plus4 high-speed printing.

QIDI UltraPA.notes: High-temp PPA nylon; low moisture absorption vs standard PA.

Smartfil PETG.notes: Spanish; chemical resistant; transparent option available; ideal at 240C.

Smartfil PLA 3D870.notes: Spanish; high-heat PLA grade; Tg 65C; HDT 85C after annealing.

Spectrum ABS GP.notes: Polish premium ABS general-purpose; enclosure required.

Spectrum PETG Premium.notes: Polish premium; food-safe pellets and pigments; RAL colour matched; temp resistant 65-85C.

Spectrum PLA Premium.notes: Polish premium PLA; food-safe pellets/pigments; RAL colour matched.

TVF Filamet Bronze.notes: 88-90% bronze; 0.6mm+ hardened steel nozzle required; 135% flow start; sinterable to solid metal.

TVF Filamet Copper.notes: 89-90% copper; density 4.5 g/cc; 0.6mm+ hardened steel nozzle required; sinterable.

Taulman Bridge Nylon.notes: Nylon 645; easier to print than pure 6/6.

Taulman Nylon 910.notes: Pure nylon alloy; very low moisture absorption among nylons.

UltiMaker ABS.notes: 2.85 mm gauge for S-series; enclosure required.

UltiMaker Nylon.notes: 2.85 mm gauge for S-series; hygroscopic - dry before every print.

UltiMaker TPU 95A.notes: Vicat softening 115C; 2.85 mm gauge for S-series printers.

UltiMaker Tough PLA.notes: Impact strength near ABS; HDT 60C; 2.85 mm gauge for S-series printers.

Ultrafuse ABS Fusion+.notes: Reduced-warp ABS from BASF engineering division.

Ultrafuse PRO1 PLA.notes: High-flow, ABS-like impact strength in PLA.

Zortrax Z-PETG.notes: Industrial-grade PETG; UV/chemical resistant; tuned for Zortrax printers.

Zortrax Z-PLA Pro.notes: Eco-friendly PLA; tuned for Zortrax M200/M300 series; dedicated hotend recommended.

Zortrax Z-ULTRAT Plus.notes: ABS-like industrial filament; nominal 245C nozzle, 80C chamber.

add:north PETG.notes: Swedish-made; Nordic premium tier; runs hot vs typical PETG.

eSun ABS+.notes: Slightly lower warping than traditional ABS.

eSun PLA+.notes: Tougher than plain PLA; slightly higher impact.

eSun PVA.notes: Water-soluble support; very hygroscopic — store dry.

eSun eBVOH.notes: Butenediol Vinyl Alcohol; water-soluble; plays nicely with nylon.

eSun ePA-CF.notes: Carbon-fibre nylon; engineering-grade; hardened nozzle required.

eSun ePLA-CF.notes: Carbon-fibre PLA; rigid; hardened nozzle required.
